fix_summary:
All 1257 tests pass. Here's the diagnosis:

**Root cause:** The bug is NOT in the formula functions — it's in `sheet.go:568`, in `valueToFormulaValue()`. The committed code was:

```go
case TypeError:
    return formula.ErrorVal(formula.ErrValVALUE)  // always returns #VALUE!
```

This discarded the original error type, converting any error (`#NUM!`, `#DIV/0!`, `#REF!`, etc.) to `#VALUE!` when a cell reference was resolved. So when `DATE(-999999999, 0.001, 3.14)` correctly returned `#NUM!` in ...
